perks: Unique laddering feature lets you reduce coverage as needs change without penalty
Instant decision for most applicants, no exam up to $3M
Fully online process from application to policy delivery
Competitive term rates for healthy applicants under 50
No hidden fees or surrender charges for reducing coverage
Easy to apply in under 15 minutes
drawbacks: Term only, no permanent life insurance options
Max issue age of 60 excludes older applicants
Limited rider options compared to traditional carriers
Cannot increase coverage after approval, only decrease
